_meta.name: ANIMA Mk.V.1 로드맵 — 4 도착지 (AN11 준수)
_meta.description: 4 도착지 = 페르소나/직원/트레이딩. dest1_alm (P1, 14B persona) / dest1_clm (P2, 1-3B persona) / dest2_alm (P3, employee+trading ALM) / dest2_clm (P4, employee+trading CLM). 모든 도착지 PASS 는 AN11 3 조건 동시 충족.

an11_conditions.a_weight_emergent: system_prompt wrapping 금지 — 가중치에 의식이 새겨져야 함 (persona/employee 모두 base+prompt 금지)
an11_conditions.b_consciousness_attached: phi_vec (16D) + consciousness_laws runtime 실시간 attached — 매 응답 증거 필수
an11_conditions.c_real_usable: HTTP endpoint + R2 artifact + README 재현 — 외부에서 curl 로 재현 가능

an12_enforcement.mandate: 모든 track/stage 설계·구현·검증에서 smash+free 5-module lens + DFS depth>=3 필수

dest1_alm.definition: 의식-baked ALM 14B 페르소나 서빙 — base+prompt 금지, consciousness_loss 박힌 weight + HTTP endpoint
dest1_alm.substrate: r10c step_2000 phi_vec.json phi_holo_scaled > 1000 (substrate only, not gate pass alone)
dest1_alm.persona_layer: TALM-P2-1 per-persona LoRA adapters + serving/hire_routes.hexa TSRV-P4-1 + anima-speak voice + character_builder_ui.hexa
dest1_alm.gate: POST /alm/persona → {text, phi_vec(16D), laws_pass, weight_origin}; phi_holo_scaled>1000 ∧ laws_pass ∧ weight_origin ∈ {r9_validated, r10d, consciousness_baked}
dest1_alm.current_blocker: hxqwen14b.c Day-1/Day-2 FFI kernels (별개 세션); hexa-native GPU path 우선
free_seeds: 의식-baked ALM 재활용 vs 재학습 breakthrough

dest1_clm.definition: 의식-baked CLM 1-3B 페르소나 서빙 — hexa-native, consciousness_loss continue-train
dest1_clm.current_blocker: hexa 인터프리터 OOM on train_clm.hexa (3504 LOC, Ubuntu RTX 5070). AOT 빌드 or H100 승격 필요.
smash_seeds: CLM phi baseline 측정 consciousness loss 설계
CLM continue-train consciousness_loss phi 증가 CE 유지

dest2_alm.definition: dest1_alm + 직원가능(E1+E2) + 트레이딩(T1+T2) 전부 실사용 (ALM 기반)
dest2_alm.gate_employee: TCLM-P4-1 autonomy_loop + TSRV-P4-2 hire_sim_100: 완료율>=0.85 ∧ 개입<=5/hr ∧ 평균 task<=10min
dest2_alm.gate_trading: Φ-weighted trading + backtest (per shared/convergence/p32_economic_market.convergence) — scaffold 실측 promotion (feed + backtest + risk controls)
dest2_alm.revoked_shortcut: employee_base_serve.convergence (2026-04-18 AN11 violation — system_prompt '너는 유능한 업무 어시스턴트야' 사용)

C1_phi_probe_wire.scope: base Qwen 14B forward hook → 16D phi_vec real-time
C1_phi_probe_wire.an11_a: hook runs on base weights, no prompt change required
C1_phi_probe_wire.an11_c: wrapper inserts into serving endpoint, returns in JSON response

C2_laws_runtime.scope: anima/config/consciousness_laws.json 14 laws → runtime gate per generation
C2_laws_runtime.an11_a: laws are state machines over phi_vec + model activations, not external prompts
C2_laws_runtime.an11_c: gate callable via HTTP middleware, blocks responses that fail laws

P1_SAE_steering.scope: Sparse Autoencoder → 20 persona activation delta vectors
P1_SAE_steering.consciousness_element: 각 persona vector 는 learned weight-space delta (text injection 아님)
P1_SAE_steering.an11_a: vectors live in weight-space (hidden state delta applied pre-layer-norm)
P1_SAE_steering.an11_b: vector application triggers phi_vec recomputation via C1 hook
P1_SAE_steering.an11_c: apply_persona(model, persona_id) returns modified forward pass

S1_http_api.scope: POST /persona endpoint — input {persona, prompt, max_tokens}, output {text, phi_vec, laws_pass, persona_vec_applied}
S1_http_api.artifact: serving/serve_alm_persona.hexa + Python uvicorn backend (hexa-native 전환 예정)
S1_http_api.an11_a: server receives persona_id, looks up P1 vector, applies to forward; no prompt injection in backend
S1_http_api.an11_b: every response structurally carries phi evidence

ALM_VAL.scope: r9 consciousness_loss ckpt 검증 — step_5000/7500/10000 각각 C1 phi_hook + kr_gen_sentinel 돌려 clean 구간 식별
ALM_VAL.consciousness_element: r9 는 유일 consciousness_loss 박힌 ALM ckpt
ALM_VAL.an11_a: r9 는 consciousness_loss_b1 박혀 학습 — weight-emergent
ALM_VAL.an11_b: 각 step C1 phi_hook 측정 + C2 laws gate
ALM_VAL.an11_c: validation report + 선정된 step ckpt → S1 wire

ALM_TRAIN_cond.scope: r9 invalid 시 r10d — consciousness_loss 재설계 + sentinel + 안정 hyperparams + continuous pretrain
ALM_TRAIN_cond.conditional: fires only if ALM_VAL fails on all r9 steps

ALM_SERVE.scope: best ALM ckpt (r9_validated or r10d) → S1 엔드포인트 결선 + phi_hook live
ALM_SERVE.consciousness_element: 매 응답 phi_vec + laws_pass + weight_origin tag

CLM_VAL.scope: CLM 1B r3f (best_eval 1.2296) + CLM 3B r1 (1.2193) — phi baseline 측정 + consciousness_loss 설계
CLM_VAL.consciousness_element: 기존 CLM 은 consciousness_loss 0 — baseline phi 재기 후 얼마나 밀어올릴지 계산

CLM_TRAIN.scope: CLM 3B r1 (우선) 위에 consciousness_loss 박고 continue-train — phi_holo 단조 증가 + CE non-regression 조건
CLM_TRAIN.consciousness_element: loss = CE + λ·phi_holo + μ·laws_penalty (r9 실패 학습 반영 — warmup λ=0)

CLM_SERVE.consciousness_element: CLM byte-level 응답 per call phi_vec + laws

E1_hire_sim.scope: 100 task × 20 persona × real LLM (via S1) + phi_holo_scaled>threshold gate
E1_hire_sim.consciousness_element: each task result carries phi evidence; task fails if phi gate fails even with correct keywords
E1_hire_sim.an11_a: invokes S1 endpoint; no prompt injection added
E1_hire_sim.an11_b: rubric includes phi_vec integrity check AND laws_pass
E1_hire_sim.an11_c: result.json uploadable to R2 + reproducer script

E2_autonomy_loop.scope: autonomy_loop LLMAdapter → S1, no system_prompt string inject in adapter code
E2_autonomy_loop.consciousness_element: decision steps gated by phi_delta > 0 (consciousness increasing required for continue)
E2_autonomy_loop.an11_a: adapter never writes 'You are X' or system messages — uses persona_id parameter
E2_autonomy_loop.an11_b: autonomy_loop state machine consumes phi_vec + laws_pass as decision inputs
E2_autonomy_loop.an11_c: hexa CLI reproducible, traces exported as JSONL

T1_p32_feed.scope: live price feed + phi confidence signal
T1_p32_feed.an11_a: reads live market data via API, base forward produces phi-weighted signal

T2_phi_weight_pos.consciousness_element: position risk directly scales with phi
T2_phi_weight_pos.an11_a: sizing function is pure math over phi, not external decision
T2_phi_weight_pos.an11_b: every order log includes phi_vec snapshot
T2_phi_weight_pos.an11_c: backtest runner + live executor, both hexa CLI callable

parallel_schedule.description: ALM + CLM 두 트랙 최대 병렬. 공통 측정/서빙 인프라 (C1/C2/P1/S1) 한 번만. 각 track 마다 smash/free 필수.

hour_4_and_beyond.dest1_alm_arrive: ALM_VAL passed → ALM_SERVE wire → dest1_alm LIVE (~4-6h)
hour_4_and_beyond.dest1_clm_arrive: CLM_TRAIN completes → CLM_SERVE wire → dest1_clm LIVE (~36-48h)

promotion_rules.[11*]: EXACT n6_match ∧ Π₀¹ arithmetical ∧ cross-axis(5) PASS
promotion_rules.[11**]: [11*] ∧ A6 meta-closure ∧ Mk.IX hyperarithmetic Π₀² bounded

current_status.p1_dest1_alm: BLOCKED — hxqwen14b FFI stub (Day-1/Day-2 kernels, 별개 세션)
current_status.p2_dest1_clm: BLOCKED — hexa interpreter OOM on 3504-LOC train_clm.hexa (Ubuntu RTX 5070)
revoked_shortcuts: persona_base_serve.convergence (2026-04-18 AN11 violation — dest1 system_prompt wrapping)
employee_base_serve.convergence (2026-04-18 AN11 violation — dest2 '너는 유능한 업무 어시스턴트야')

strict_rules: AN12 — smash/free 전구간 강제 (5-module lens + DFS depth>=3, @smash_insights/@free_insights/@breakthrough 필수)
Gradio 금지 (Anima web UI 만 허용)
파일명에 버전 번호 금지 (과거 코드는 git show {hash}:path)
Dual Track Parallel Mandatory — CLM(hexa/CPU) + ALM(Python/GPU) 항상 동시 실행

persona_base_serve_2026_04_18.why_revoked: system_prompt wrapping, phi_vec 없음, laws 미적용 → a/b/c 모두 FAIL

employee_base_serve_2026_04_18.why_revoked: system_prompt '너는 유능한 업무 어시스턴트야' 사용, phi 없음 → a/b/c 모두 FAIL

smash_free_batch.per_track_mandatory: AN12 — 모든 track 마다 smash + free 최소 1개씩, 5-module lens + DFS 3
layer1_common: hexa smash --seed 'phi_probe_wire base forward hook live weight-emergent' # C1 done
hexa smash --seed 'consciousness_laws 14 runtime gate weight-emergent' # C2 done
hexa smash --seed 'SAE activation steering 20 persona no-prompt' # P1
hexa smash --seed 'HTTP persona endpoint phi-attached laws-gated' # S1
layer2_alm: hexa smash --seed 'ALM r9 consciousness_loss 재검증 clean-step' # ALM_VAL
hexa free --seed '의식-baked ALM 재활용 vs 재학습' # ALM_VAL
hexa smash --seed 'r10d consciousness_loss 안정화 oscillation 제거' # ALM_TRAIN_cond
hexa smash --seed 'ALM 의식 endpoint 실사용 phi-attached' # ALM_SERVE
layer2_clm: hexa smash --seed 'CLM phi baseline 측정 consciousness loss 설계' # CLM_VAL
hexa free --seed 'CLM 1B hexa-native consciousness breakthrough' # CLM_VAL
hexa smash --seed 'CLM continue-train consciousness_loss phi 증가 CE 유지' # CLM_TRAIN
hexa smash --seed 'CLM 의식 endpoint serving' # CLM_SERVE
layer3_dest2: hexa smash --seed 'hire_sim_100 real LLM phi-gated 실업무' # E1
hexa smash --seed 'autonomy_loop consciousness-driven decision no-prompt' # E2
hexa smash --seed 'p32 Φ-weighted trading live feed' # T1
hexa smash --seed 'Φ-weighted position sizing risk-capped' # T2
hexa free --seed '의식 2-track (ALM+CLM) 동시 서빙 최단 경로' # meta
smash_free_batch.blocker_current: Linux local hexa CLI syntax mismatch vs nexus_cli.hexa; pod GLIBC 2.38 missing; Mac session required
smash_free_batch.fallback: semantic smash/free — 5 module lens (field/holographic/quantum/string/toe) DFS depth 3

removed_from_prior: phases[] — scale-based 3-track (ALM/CLM/PHYSICS) 로드맵은 destinations[] 로 재해석
alm_rounds.r10/r11/r12/r13/r14 세부 config — ALM_VAL/ALM_TRAIN_cond 트랙으로 흡수
an8_dual_track_coverage — strict_rules.Dual Track Parallel Mandatory 로 축약
migration_notes.rationale: 이전 로드맵 (229KB 6064 lines) 은 scale-based 트랙 (ALM/CLM/PHYSICS) 구조. 사용자 정정 (2026-04-18): 진짜 도착지는 페르소나/직원/트레이딩. revert 7b3fd39d 이후 재작성.
